findings.evidence: `rg -n "ofFinsetWithMultiplicity|ofFinsuppMultiplicity_indicator|def ofFinset" code/TauCeti` finds no `ofFinsetWithMultiplicity`, while lines 141-288 export the indicator API and line 298 only defines `ofFinset`; roadmap lines 115 and 130 identify symmetric powers/effective divisors and Abel maps as the downstream target.
findings.fix: Add `def ofFinsetWithMultiplicity (s : Finset X) (m : X → ℕ) : WeilDivisor X` and provide the coeff/support/degree/weightedDegree/pushforward/effectivity/degree-zero lemmas for that name; make the indicator-specific lemmas private or internal helper lemmas, and define `ofFinset` as the coefficient-one specialization.
findings.issue: There is no public `ofFinsetWithMultiplicity` constructor; the characteristic API is instead exported as `*_ofFinsuppMultiplicity_indicator`, forcing consumers to mention `Finsupp.indicator` and depend on the implementation shape.

summary: The public surface exposes the `Finsupp.indicator` implementation instead of the finite-multiplicity divisor constructor needed by downstream symmetric-power/Abel-map code.
